creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
Quick update:
./configure options are still bad, and I am going to see if I can figure 
out why it don't know python was there, but the 400 errors only happen 
on firefox 4.x on max osx.

I cleared cache, still didn't work.
I used safari, it works.. go figure.

Maintainer: please don't close this (yet), I will try to send you some 
patches for ../configure, and maybe make python work.

If I accidentally figure out how to fix firefox, I will let you know.

--
